properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用敏感词过滤 Starter

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.annotation-enabled
properties.description: 是否启用 @SensitiveCheck 注解增强切面

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.dict-path
properties.description: 敏感词词库路径，支持 classpath: 前缀，未配置时使用内置默认词库

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.replacement
properties.description: 命中敏感词后使用的替换字符

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.ignore-case
properties.description: 匹配时是否忽略大小写

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.skip-symbols
properties.description: 匹配时是否跳过干扰字符

properties.name: clazs.wordfilter.max-match
properties.description: 匹配时是否启用最大匹配原则
